role_title: Senior Product Program Manager, Roadmap Planning & Program Management

location.office_time_required: must be based in San Francisco-Bay Area, CA

level_signals: 13+ years of experience in program management, product management, or business operations
Proven ability to build strong relationships with business leaders up to executive level
Comp range $212K-$265K base consistent with senior/staff IC at Airbnb

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 13+ years of  experience in a combination of program management, product management, or business operations managing sophisticated software product programs from end to end in a creative-led, fast paced environment
Strong product and/or technology experience including product management or engineering (software preferred)
Demonstrated ability of shipping software products at global scale having overcome a variety of challenges
Critical thinking skills to develop bespoke program plans that are custom to the needs of the specific program
World-class verbal and written communication skills that can simplify complex topics
Proven ability to build strong relationships and be a trusted agent for change with business leaders (up to the executive level)
Track record for successfully managing ambitious and operationally complex projects with cross-functional teams across product development, product marketing, design, marketing, and operations
Expertise in using program management tools such as Airtable, Asana, Jira, Smartsheets, etc.
Thrives in ambiguity in a fast-paced, hyper-growth organization

scope.surface: Company roadmap planning and product program management; bi-annual release planning and delivery
primary_metrics_inferred: On-schedule delivery of product roadmap items
core_responsibilities: Partners with engineering, product marketing, design, community support, and other cross functional teams to deliver software product programs with the highest quality and on schedule
Understands dependencies across functions to optimize the overall system and deliver the highest quality offerings at scale
Anticipates upcoming risks and issues and develops risk mitigation strategies proactively in a fast pace environment
Develops program plans that are unique to each initiative and require strategic thinking
Operates at a variety of altitudes by tailoring communication style and approach
Goes beyond status reporting to drive issues to resolution
Understands best practices, drives improvements, and focuses on simplification

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as potentially eligible alongside bonus and Employee Travel Credits

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($212K-$265K base)
Multiple openings available — suggests real hiring demand
Clear team mission and mandate described (roadmap planning + bi-annual releases)
Role explicitly partners with executives — high visibility
Bonus, equity, and Employee Travel Credits noted as additional upside
red_flags: Must be physically based in San Francisco-Bay Area — eliminates remote candidates nationwide
Extensive state exclusion list (12 states) limits flexibility even for Bay Area adjacent roles
13+ years minimum is very high bar, may limit candidate pool
Visa sponsorship not addressed — unclear for international candidates
Location type treated as hybrid based on 'based in SF-Bay Area' language but no explicit office percentage stated

fields_inferred_not_stated: location.type (inferred as hybrid; JD says must be based in SF-Bay Area but does not specify an explicit in-office percentage)
scope.business_model (inferred from Airbnb's known marketplace model)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated in JD)
seniority.level (inferred from comp range and 13+ years requirement)
ambiguities: Location type: JD requires candidate to be 'based in San Francisco-Bay Area, CA' but does not state an explicit in-office percentage or confirm fully onsite vs hybrid; treated as hybrid here.
Visa sponsorship: not mentioned in the JD; left as 'unclear'.
The role title says 'Senior' but comp range ($212K-$265K) and '13+ years' could also span Staff-level; JD notes 'job titles may span more than one career level'.
